syswatch.desc: Live terminal task manager dashboard tracking real-time CPU & RAM usage.

webget.desc: High-speed URL resource downloader that runs directly inside your console.

hexview.desc: Inspects raw binary byte maps of local files in side-by-side Hex/ASCII panels.

speedtest.desc: Tests your live network connection and calculates active internet bandwidth speeds.

cryptorate.desc: Fetches and displays live real-time financial trading prices for top crypto coins.

backup.desc: Safely duplicates files or folder structures into a timestamped backup directory.

fsize.desc: Scans your folder and lists the top heaviest files sorted by drive size.
